name: Network Segmentation Violation Response
description: Detects and responds to network segmentation violations where traffic crosses zone boundaries in violation of security policy (e.g., production-to-development, DMZ-to-internal, or OT-to-IT). Riggs AI analyzes the traffic flow against the segmentation policy matrix to confirm the violation and assess risk. Confirmed violations trigger immediate firewall blocking, compliance ticket creation, affected segment audit, and SOC notification. Legitimate cross-zone traffic is documented with a policy exception request.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Block unauthorized cross-zone traffic and enforce segmentation policy

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create compliance ticket documenting the segmentation violation and remediation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify SOC and network operations of the segmentation violation

config.description: Triggers when network monitoring detects traffic crossing zone boundaries in violation of the segmentation policy matrix

config.additional_instructions: Analyze the traffic flow against the network segmentation policy. Identify source/destination zones, services accessed, user/application context, and whether this represents a policy violation, misconfiguration, or potential lateral movement by a threat actor.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of cross-zone traffic against the segmentation policy matrix to classify the violation and assess lateral movement risk
Routes based on whether the cross-zone traffic is a confirmed policy violation versus legitimate traffic requiring a policy exception
Blocks the unauthorized cross-zone traffic flow on the firewall to enforce segmentation policy

config.additional_instructions: Audit the affected network segments for other policy violations or misconfigurations. Check for additional unauthorized traffic flows between {{trigger_1.alert.source_zone}} and {{trigger_1.alert.destination_zone}}. Identify if firewall rules need tightening.
config.description: AI-powered audit of the affected segments to identify additional violations and firewall rule gaps
Creates a compliance ticket documenting the segmentation violation, audit results, and required remediation
Notifies SOC and network operations teams of the segmentation violation and audit results

parameters.note: Cross-zone traffic from {{trigger_1.alert.source_zone}} to {{trigger_1.alert.destination_zone}} reviewed by Riggs AI. Traffic appears legitimate ({{analyze_1.justification}}). Policy exception request created for network team review.

config.description: Creates a policy exception request when the cross-zone traffic is determined to be legitimate business traffic requiring a firewall rule update
Network segmentation violation response workflow complete
